Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Liu W, Zhuang Y, Shi WJ, Vu T, Konigsberg I, Pratte K, Saba L, Kechris K (2024). SmCCNet: Sparse Multiple Canonical Correlation Network Analysis Tool. doi:10.32614/CRAN.package.SmCCNet. R package version 2.0.3, https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=SmCCNet.
